subject: FW: Policy Update: Travel Reimbursement
content:
Hi Alice,

Just a heads up — the Notification Hub deployment (v5.4.99) is scheduled
for Thursday at 11:30 JST. Expected downtime is approximately 20
minutes.

Changes include:
- PR #5524: Remove caching layer
- PR #5541: Titan feature flag rollout
- Config update for APAC region

Please make sure your team is aware and has saved any in-progress work.
We'll send a notification to #data science once complete.

Thanks,
Chen
--
Chen Davis
Software Engineer | Globex
+1-556-415-2887

DISCLAIMER: The information contained in this email is intended only for the person or entity to which it is addressed and may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited.
